productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girl Check Pink Shorts
description: Composition Pink checked shorts with two side pockets, two back pockets, zipped and buttoned front closure with a crystal embellishment on the button and belt loops on the waist Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Her cuteness level will be off the chart when you dress your little girl in these checked shorts from doodle. Team this with a T-shirt and cute sandals, and let your little one play in comfort.
